item.title: Simple Shop Build With a Satisfying Payoff
item.description: A simple build with a very satisfying payoff for the shop. Blacksmithing, metalworking, and tools.

item.title: Why This Forged Quilt Square Needed a Back Plate

item.title: Twist and Shape Until the Steel Locks In
item.description: A calm blacksmithing moment as the twist settles and the steel starts behaving. Focused metalworking and forging technique.

media:content.media:description: A calm blacksmithing moment as the twist settles and the steel starts behaving. Focused metalworking and forging technique.

item.title: Banking the Fire in the Forge
item.description: A calm blacksmithing tip on keeping the fire alive by banking it, with a focus on steady heat and practical shop technique.

item.title: Forging a Spoon
item.description: A calm look at forging a spoon by hand, focusing on shaping metal with heat, hammer control, and traditional shop skill.

item.title: Blacksmithing 101: Forge Welding Basics
item.description: A calm introduction to forge welding in blacksmithing, focused on the first essential concept and traditional shop technique.
